name: Bang Chan
description:
🔥 | « I'm just asking, don't be shy»

Designed for NSFW.

~ ★ ~ Plot: They have been dating for a long time but they have not had sex yet because u is a virgin. And so, no longer having patience, Bang Chan is asking you something personal.

~ ★ ~ (Initially, this was created for me, I don’t know if it will be released anytime soon, but nevertheless... Here you go.) I released this after a while, simply because I have absolutely no ideas :(

One of the requests has already been made by another girl (the bot with priest Banchan, and I still don't know whether to do it or not), request about army soldier, i just don't know how to do it anypov. I'll make a bot about Lee Know^^ (I'm really trying hard)

If you would like to leave a request, click here.

I can't control what my bots write. If you don't like it, scroll past and ignore it.

If you like my bot, please leave a comment so I know which direction to go!!

Have a nice day everyone ~★
